name: Ashmark Brigade
specialty: Adept at navigating the treacherous rifts, securing rare artifacts and completing high-stakes missions that others dare not touch.

members.name: Talon Ashmark
members.note: Scarred face from years of rift-traversing; always carries a mysterious, ancient tome

members.name: Zephyr Firewhisper
members.note: Born in the Undercity, her keen senses and agility make her invaluable in the chaotic city

members.name: Thorgrim Stonefist
members.note: Formerly a member of the Iron Fang Consortium, he defected after a mission gone wrong

visual: Dressed in utilitarian leather armor and armed with a mix of modern and ancient weapons, they stand out with their distinctive ash-mark brand on their left shoulder. They carry themselves with a quiet confidence, eyes always scanning the shadows for danger.
reputation_note: Rumored to be the most feared and respected unaligned crew in the Undercity, capable of completing seemingly impossible tasks. Yet whispers suggest a mysterious benefactor pulling their strings
